seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Paddys Green and Paget. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Paddys Green vs Paget: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paddys Green and Paget.
heading: Paddys Green vs Paget — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paddys Green, Queensland and Paget, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paget has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Paddys Green (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paddys Green or Paget safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paddys Green has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Paget scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paddys Green scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Paget scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paddys Green or Paget?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paget has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
